content.en:
Chapter 750: The Exploration of the Supremes!

"I wonder if the fragments of the shattered Origin Well will be integrated into the Great Dao Vision?"

Ye Tian asked very seriously.

"What, fragments of the Well of Origin?" Aurora's pupils shrank sharply, and he said, "Lord of Ten Thousand Laws, how strong is the Well of Origin, how can it be shattered, even the Supreme of the Lord of the Yuan Gu can't break a Well of Origin! The Well of Origin contains the power of the Origin of the Universe, which can counteract ninety percent of the rule attacks and pure energy attacks, and most of our cultivators' attacks rely on rules, even the power of talent is closely related to the rules." And the soul ability can't cause damage to the Well of Origin at all, unless it is a pure power attack that can cause some damage to the Well of Origin. It's a pity, if you want to reach the level of shattering the Well of Origin, I'm afraid that you have a top supreme of the seventh-order life level, and you can only destroy the Well of Origin by cultivating your physical body to the top level!"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank, only then did he know how difficult it was to destroy the Well of Origin, he also thought that the Supremes could destroy the Well of Origin, after all, he was only at the peak realm of the Universe God, so he destroyed a broken Well of Origin!

"It seems that it is because the Well of Origin is shattered and cannot offset the attack, and my attack power itself is not weak, and I have been attacking all the time, and I finally broke the Well of Origin! According to Aurora's introduction, the complete Well of Origin cannot even be destroyed by the Lord of the Ancient Ages, but the Origin Ancestor of this world should be able to break it with pure physical strength. Maybe it was the two Origin Ancestors who fought near that Origin Well in the first place, which caused the damage of that Origin Well, thus cheapening me!"

This was Ye Tian's guess, but he felt that this guess should be very reasonable.

"Aurora, I just want to know if the fragments of the Origin Well can be integrated into the Great Dao Vision once the Well of Origin is shattered!" Ye Tian said again.

"This ......"

Aurora recalled his knowledge about the Well of Origin, and then shook his head and said, "Lord of Ten Thousand Laws, I really don't know much about this, but I do know one thing, that is, the Well of Origin itself should be regarded as a special kind of treasure, if the Well of Origin is broken, those fragments should be regarded as treasure fragments." The Treasure Fragment must not be able to be integrated into the Great Dao Vision, I wonder why the Ten Thousand Laws God Lord asks this?"

"Nothing, just curiosity!"

Ye Tian smiled and said.

Aurora didn't ask, he guessed that Ye Tian estimated that there was any secret, but it was not easy to delve into it, after all, he was not Ye Tian's opponent, what if he escaped and found some amazing secrets, causing Ye Tian to kill people?

Subsequently, Aurora took her leave.

Looking at the aurora in the distance, Ye Tian muttered, "It seems that this aurora is very afraid of me!"

He knew why Aurora was afraid, first, the nine-colored sacred cow cubs, second, the two sides were still hostile, and third, the difference in strength.

"If it was the Origin Ancestor cub, I might still be tempted, but it was just a Nine-Colored Divine Cow cub, but it was not in my eyes! Unfortunately, Aurora didn't know why the fragments of the Origin Well were integrated into the Great Dao Vision, and when I went back, I asked the Kunwu Supreme Lord, I don't know if they were clear. "

However, Ye Tian also knew very well that the knowledge of the Kunwu Supreme was also very limited, and they did not necessarily know this secret.

Suddenly, Ye Tian thought of the source beast cub again,

I have to say that the source beast cub is indeed a big help.

"If I can get a Origin Ancestor cub, it will definitely be of great help to the Terrans, even if I am not in the Terrans in the future, there is a Origin Ancestor sitting in the Terrans, and the other big clans will definitely not dare to provoke the Terrans!" Ye Tiandao.

He knew very well that he would have to leave the Terrans often in the future to find opportunities, and there were really not many supremes of the Terrans, and they were very weak, and the Terrans really had no hope of rising in a short period of time, so they could only rely on external forces.

The second and third deities are indeed very good, but their combat power is limited, and they can't reach the level of the Lord of the Yuan Gu at all, which is also the limit of the deity's talent.

Therefore, he really wanted to get the Origin Ancestor Cub, preferably the kind of Origin Ancestor Cub that was very powerful.

But he also knows very well that such a Origin Ancestor cub is very difficult to obtain, even if he knows where there is a Origin Ancestor cub, it is equivalent to confronting a Origin Ancestor!

Aurora stole a top Source Emperor's cub, and they were all hunted down like this, if he stole the Source Ancestor cub, it is estimated that he would not even be able to escape.

He didn't think that his Death Flower Sea could compete with a Origin Ancestor, nor did he believe that his Chaos Origin Divine Well would be able to block the Origin Ancestor's attack.

Therefore, it all depends on luck.

"Let's go, let's pay attention to the information of the origin ancestor cub, if you can find it, try it, if you can't find it, forget it!"

Swish!

Ye Tian also left this area.

----------

The main space of the universe.

Now, after the Supremes of the Twelve Universe Era and the Supremes of All Races had already joined forces to repel the Destruction Creatures, they had cleaned up the Celestial-level Destruction Creatures of the Domination-level battlefield and the Cosmic God Battlefield.

And somewhere on the dominant-level battlefield, the figures of seven or eight supremes appeared here.

Among them, the strongest supreme is the golden light supreme.

As for the Supreme Lords of the Yuan Gu and others, they are still breaking the abyss and have not come out, after all, once there are too many Supremes who leave, the Destruction King may rush out again, and it will be troublesome.

The Golden Light Supreme and others appeared here, not for anything else, but to find the sons of the Aurora and other eras.

"This is it, the aura of the children of the era such as Aurora disappeared from here, and they did not die, obviously entered a certain dimensional world. Moreover, just now I forcibly urged the time and space, and I also confirmed that the Children of the Era and others had entered the dimensional world. However, there are too many dimensional worlds, and without knowing the coordinates, it takes time and strength to explore layer by layer, and please help me break through the void here, pursue their breath, and explore layer by layer!"

Golden Light Supreme Dao.

"Jinguang Supreme, don't worry, we will definitely complete the task!"

Several other Supremes nodded in response.

Immediately, the Golden Light Supreme and several others urged the power of the Supreme to break through this piece of void and explore the dimensional world layer by layer.
